description: Ara operon from RegulonDB (v13): AraC, CRP, transport (araE, araFGH), structural genes (araB, araA, araD, araC), and L-arabinose pathway (L-Arabinose → Ribulose → R5P → X5P).
name: Ara Operon (RegulonDB-sourced)
notes: V3 = RegulonDB only. AraC/CRP regulate araBAD, araC, araE, araFGH; pathway: AraA isomerase, AraB kinase, AraD epimerase.
mermaid:
graph TD
    ARAB[L-Arabinose]
    CAMP[cAMP]
    ARAC[AraC]
    CRP[CRP]
    ARAE[araE]
    ARAF[araFGH]
    ARABAD[araBAD]
    ARAC2[araC]
    RIB[L-Ribulose]
    R5P[Ribulose-5-P]
    X5P[Xylulose-5-P]
    ARAB -->|transport| ARAE
    ARAB -->|transport| ARAF
    ARAB -->|inducer| ARAC
    CAMP -->|activates| CRP
    ARAC -->|represses/activates| ARABAD
    ARAC -->|represses/activates| ARAE
    CRP -->|activates| ARABAD
    CRP -->|activates| ARAC2
    ARAC -->|activates| ARAC2
    ARAB -->|AraA isomerase| RIB
    RIB -->|AraB kinase| R5P
    R5P -->|AraD epimerase| X5P
    style ARAB fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style CAMP fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style ARAC fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style CRP fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style ARAE fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARAF fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARABAD fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARAC2 fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RIB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style R5P fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style X5P fill:#b197fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: From RegulonDB (v13) ara operon: AraC, CRP, araE, araFGH, araBAD, araC; pathway from RegulonDB/ECOCYC.

sources.title: RegulonDB
sources.note: E. coli AraC, CRP, ara operon, araE, araFGH.
